name: lumacart-ecommerce

scripts.desktop: concurrently --kill-others --success first --names BACKEND,FRONTEND,ELECTRON "npm run server" "npm run dev -- --host 127.0.0.1" "wait-on http-get://127.0.0.1:5050/api/health http-get://127.0.0.1:5173 && ./node_modules/.bin/electron ."
scripts.desktop:debug: ELECTRON_ENABLE_LOGGING=1 LUMACART_OPEN_DEVTOOLS=true concurrently --kill-others --success first --names BACKEND,FRONTEND,ELECTRON "npm run server" "npm run dev -- --host 127.0.0.1" "wait-on http-get://127.0.0.1:5050/api/health http-get://127.0.0.1:5173 && ./node_modules/.bin/electron ."

description: A portfolio e-commerce desktop application built with React, Express, SQLite, and Electron.
author: Matthew Plants
